name: make87
documentation: # make87 for python3

functions.name: make87.peripherals.resolve_peripheral_name
documentation:
Resolve a peripheral name to its mount location.

Args:
    name: Name of peripheral used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.

Returns:
    The mount path or name of the peripheral on the node.

Get the session.

    The session singleton.

Raises:

functions.name: make87.handlers.logging_handler.setup
documentation: Sets up the logging handler. Automatically forwards all logs as messages to the 'LOGS' topic.

documentation: Cleans up the logging handler and restores original logging configuration.

functions.name: make87.initialize
documentation: Initializes the Make87 SDK. Must be called before using any other SDK functions.

functions.name: make87.endpoints.get_provider
documentation:
Retrieve a publisher endpoint by name.

Args:
    name: The name of the endpoint to retrieve used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.
    requester_message_type: The type of message that's send to the endpoint.
    provider_message_type: The type of message that's received from the endpoint.

Returns:
    The publisher endpoint object.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the endpoint is not found.
    ValueError: If the endpoint is not a publisher endpoint.

functions.name: make87.endpoints.get_requester
documentation:
Retrieve a subscriber endpoint by name.

Args:
    name: The name of the endpoint to retrieve used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.
    requester_message_type: The type of message that's send to the endpoint.
    provider_message_type: The type of message that's received from the endpoint.

Returns:
    The subscriber endpoint object.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the endpoint is not found.
    ValueError: If the endpoint is not a subscriber endpoint.

functions.name: make87.endpoints.resolve_endpoint_name
documentation:
Resolve a endpoint name to its dynamic endpoint key.

Args:
    name: Name of the endpoint used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.

Returns:
    The dynamic endpoint key used to reference the endpoint.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the endpoint name is not found.

A typed subscriber endpoint that provides messages of type `T`.

functions.name: make87.topics.get_publisher
documentation:
Retrieve a publisher topic by name.

Args:
    name: The name of the topic to retrieve used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.
    message_type: The type of message to be published.

Returns:
    The publisher topic object.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the topic is not found.
    ValueError: If the topic is not a publisher topic.

functions.name: make87.topics.get_subscriber
documentation:
Retrieve a subscriber topic by name.

Args:
    name: The name of the topic to retrieve used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.
    message_type: The type of message to be subscribed to. Will be used for automatic decoding.

Returns:
    The subscriber topic object.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the topic is not found.
    ValueError: If the topic is not a subscriber topic.

functions.name: make87.topics.resolve_topic_name
documentation:
Resolve a topic name to its dynamic topic key.

Args:
    name: Name of the topic used in the `MAKE87.yml` file.

Returns:
    The dynamic topic key used to reference the topic.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the make87 library has not been initialized correctly. Call `make87.initialize()`.
    ValueError: If the topic name is not found.
